name: skylight-mcp
description: Skylight Calendar MCP — read/write family calendar events, chores, rewards, and shared lists via Claude. Auth via email/password or fetchproxy browser extension.

skylight_email.title: Email
skylight_email.description: Skylight account email. Pair with the password below for direct login. Leave blank to use the fetchproxy browser extension instead.

skylight_password.title: Password
skylight_password.description: Skylight account password. Required only when the email above is set. Stored locally in the bundle config — keep it private.
